one_time_description: Remeasurement gain on portfolio investments from change in accounting policy (adoption of PS 3450 Financial Instruments)
economic_notes: Nation has extensive business enterprises including oilfield services, contracting (TDN Contracting), land site services (Janvier Land Site Services), real estate development, industry relations, and pipeline services. Chipewyan Prairie First Nation Business Trust was dissolved subsequent to year end and investments distributed to the First Nation. Several entities reclassified from GBEs to governmental units during the year.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to asset retirement obligations not being estimated or recorded (PS 3280 adopted April 1, 2022). Consolidated entity includes 12 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 17 GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Several entities (Chipewyan Prairie Store LP, Prairie Dene Development LP, Janvier Laundry Facility LP) reclassified from GBEs to governmental units during the year causing significant balance sheet reclassifications. Accumulated surplus of $88,483,413 includes $1,761,557 in accumulated remeasurement gains. Total accumulated surplus on operations is $86,721,856. Large portfolio investments including Land Claim Settlement Trust ($6,635,261) and Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust ($24,145,033). Transfer of tangible capital assets of $14,926,589 noted in statement of change in net financial assets. ISC funding calculation: total government transfers includes ISC $17,463,915 + CMHC subsidies $249,672 + Athabasca Tribal Council $517,349 + First Nation Development Funds $977,383 + Other government funding $26,246 = $19,234,565 (rounded to $19,234,515 per available line items). OSR calculated as total revenue $33,278,450 minus government transfers $19,234,515 = $14,043,935. Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
